finding_results.notes: Revised the three cited Owen/Prue dialogue clusters to break clean clarification ladders with failed formulations, premise refinements, side-angle questions, and less tidy inferential handoffs while keeping Owen literal/evasive and Prue precise but pressure-frayed.
finding_results.summary: The late-scene exchanges now carry more interruption, repair, and friction, so Owen and Prue sound less composed and more overheard without losing legibility or chapter continuity.

summary: Addressed the dialogue-cadence packet finding by revising the three cited Owen/Prue exchanges in chapter 5 and preserving the chapter's quiet-collaboration arc.
